creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
The first release candidate of the FreeRDP 2.0.0 series (RC0) was released on 24th July 2017:
https://github.com/FreeRDP/FreeRDP/releases/tag/2.0.0-rc0

We should update to this version, as it is a tagged release candidate as opposed to the current port version which simply a GitHub commit which was found to be working. It will also allows FreeBSD to provide any feedback to the upstream project prior to the final 2.0.0 release if we find any bugs.
